name: Jamaican Rice and Peas with Coconut Milk
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cooked red kidney beans (reserve liquid)
Water (enough to make 2 1/4 cups combined liquid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook red kidney beans according to package directions.
2. Transfer cooked beans into a large saucepan or pot.
3. Add chopped garlic.
4. Measure all liquids: reserved bean liquid, coconut milk, and water to make 2 1/4 cups combined.
5. Add the measured liquids to the beans and garlic in the pot.
6. Add rice, chopped green onions, thyme, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Bring mixture to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and cover. Cook for about 20 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
